designNotes.skillBaseline: Summon 2 zombie dogs (10s duration, 12s CD). Dogs have HP, attack interval 3s, deal chaos via bite. Dog bites apply Haunted combo state (5s) for Spirit Barrage to consume. While alive, dogs create spirit_link state for Mass Sacrifice to consume.

buildIdentities.plague_doctor: Bites are vectors for disease — every bite a poison/bleed apply. Pack as a debuff distribution system.
buildIdentities.spirit_caller: Bigger, stronger, more persistent pack. Bone wardens that sustain themselves.
buildIdentities.voodoo_master: Dogs feed soul stacks and hex synergy. Pack as a soul-feeder for burst skills.

branches.theme: Every bite spreads disease. The dogs are vectors as much as warriors.

nodes.name: Rotting Fangs
nodes.description: Each dog bite applies 1/2 stacks of Poisoned (3s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBitePoisonStacks (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook for zombie_dog: per bite apply N poisoned stacks)

nodes.name: Disease Carrier
nodes.description: Dog bites have 25/50% chance to apply Bleeding (3s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteBleedingChance (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: roll chance per bite, apply bleeding)

nodes.name: Plague Hounds
nodes.description: Dogs deal +50% damage to Plagued targets.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogsBonusDamageVsPlagued (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: if target has plagued debuff, multiply dog damage by 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: Pack Plague
nodes.description: +5/10% damage per debuff on target (applies to YOUR skills, not dog attacks).
engineFields: conditionalMods.perAilmentStackOnTarget (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Putrid Bite
nodes.description: Dog bites have +5/10% chance to apply 1 extra debuff stack (Poisoned or Bleeding, whichever the target already has).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteExtraStackChance (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: roll chance, apply +1 stack of existing debuff)

nodes.name: Crit Bite
nodes.description: Dog critical strikes apply 1/2 stacks each of Poisoned and Bleeding.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogCritExtraStacks (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: if dog crits, apply specified stacks)

nodes.name: Chaos Mastery
nodes.description: +10/20% chaos penetration.
engineFields: chaosPenetration (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Apply All DoTs
nodes.description: Dog bites have 10% chance to apply ALL of your active DoTs to the target (matching current snapshots).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteApplyAllDotsChance (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: roll chance; if hit, copy all caster DoT debuffs to target with current snapshots)

nodes.name: DoT Support
nodes.description: +15/30% damage to DoT-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Eternal Plague
nodes.description: All DoTs applied by your dogs have +100% duration. Cost: −25% dog damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogAppliedDotDurationBonus (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: when dog applies a debuff, multiply duration by 1 + value/100); minionDamageMult (EXISTS, negative)

nodes.name: Pestilent Pack
nodes.description: Dogs apply Plagued (5s) on every bite. Cost: dog attack interval +1s (slower).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteAppliesPlagued (NEW); zombieDogAttackIntervalReduction (EXISTS, negative = slower)

nodes.name: Death Pulse
nodes.description: When a dog dies, it explodes for 100% of its max HP as chaos AoE damage to nearby enemies.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogDeathPulsePercent (NEW — minions.ts on dog death: emit AoE damage event = m.maxHp * value/100 to pack neighbors)

nodes.name: THE PLAGUE PACK
nodes.description: All dog attacks apply BOTH Hexed AND Haunted on hit. Cost: −50% dog max HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteAppliesHexedHaunted (NEW); minionHpMult (EXISTS, negative)

branches.theme: Bigger, stronger, more persistent. The pack is a fortress of bone and rot.

nodes.name: Bone Warden
nodes.description: +20/40% dog max HP.
engineFields: minionHpMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack Spawn
nodes.description: On Zombie Dogs cast: 25/50% chance to also summon a 3s spirit minion.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); summonMinion (NEW)

nodes.name: Alpha Pack
nodes.description: +1 extra dog summoned (3 instead of 2).
engineFields: extraZombieDogCount (EXISTS in 34 staff fields)

nodes.name: Pack Power
nodes.description: +10/20% dog damage per dog currently alive.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogPackPowerPerDog (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: count alive zombie_dog minions, multiply damage by 1 + count * value/100)

nodes.name: Pack Hunter
nodes.description: +15/30% damage while 2+ minions alive (your skills + dog attacks).
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Lifesteal
nodes.description: Dog bites have 25/50% chance to heal you for 1% max HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteLifesteal (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: roll chance, heal player by maxHp * healPercent/100)

nodes.name: Quick Bite
nodes.description: Dog attack interval reduced by 0.5/1.0s (faster bites).
engineFields: zombieDogAttackIntervalReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Dog Regen
nodes.description: Dogs heal 5% of max HP per second while not taking damage (3s after last hit).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogRegenPercentPerSecond + dogRegenSafeWindowSeconds (NEW — minions.ts tick: per zombie_dog, if no hit in last N seconds, heal m.maxHp * percent/100)

nodes.name: Minion Mastery Support
nodes.description: +15/30% minion damage.
engineFields: minionDamageMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack of Five
nodes.description: +3 extra dogs (5 total). Cost: −40% dog max HP per dog.
engineFields: extraZombieDogCount (EXISTS); minionHpMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Endless Pack
nodes.description: When a dog dies, after 3s it auto-revives at 50% HP. Cost: −25% dog max HP.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogAutoReviveSeconds + dogAutoReviveHpPercent (NEW — minions.ts on dog death: schedule revive after seconds at hp%); minionHpMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Aura of Death
nodes.description: Each living dog grants you a +10% damage aura (passive, all skills).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogAuraDamagePerDog (NEW — staff.ts preRoll for any caster cast: count alive zombie_dog minions, damageMult *= 1 + count * value/100)

nodes.name: THE ALPHA
nodes.description: Summon only 1 Alpha dog (instead of 2): 3× HP, 2× damage, 50% slower attacks. Cost: max 1 dog instead of 2.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.alphaDogMode (NEW — staff.ts summonMinions for zombie_dog: if flag set, count=1, hp*=hpMult, damage*=damageMult, interval*=intervalMult)

branches.theme: Dogs feed soul stacks and hex synergy. Pack as a soul-feeder for your burst skills.

nodes.name: Pack Aura
nodes.description: +5/10% all your damage while any dog is alive.
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileMinionsAlive (EXISTS) — flavored dogPackAuraDamage per identity matrix

nodes.name: Soul Bite
nodes.description: Dog bites have 10/20% chance to generate 1 soul_stack. ICD 2s.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteSoulStackChance + ICD (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: roll chance with throttle, createComboState soul_stack)

nodes.name: Cursed Pack
nodes.description: Dogs deal +50% damage to Hexed targets.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogsBonusDamageVsHexed (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: if target hexed, multiply by 1 + value/100)

nodes.name: Hex Synergy
nodes.description: +15/30% damage on Hexed targets (your skills).
engineFields: conditionalMods.whileDebuffActive (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Stack Synergy
nodes.description: +5/10% dog damage per active soul_stack.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogDamagePerSoulStack (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: dog damage *= 1 + soulStackStacks * value/100)

nodes.name: Crit Soul
nodes.description: Dog critical strikes generate 1 soul_stack (50/100% chance, ICD 2s).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogCritSoulStackChance + ICD (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: on crit, roll chance with throttle, createComboState soul_stack)

nodes.name: Quickdraw
nodes.description: −15/30% Zombie Dogs cooldown.
engineFields: cooldownReduction (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack Catalyst
nodes.description: On Zombie Dogs cast: generate 2 soul_stacks immediately.
engineFields: procs[onCast] (EXISTS); createComboState (NEW)

nodes.name: Burst Mastery
nodes.description: +20/40% damage to Heavy-tagged skills.
engineFields: incDamage (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Bloodhounds
nodes.description: Dog bites also deal +1% of target's max HP as bonus chaos damage. Cost: dog max HP −30%.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteMaxHpDamagePercent (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: dog damage += target.maxHp * value/100); minionHpMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Hex Pack
nodes.description: Every 3rd dog bite applies Hexed (5s). Cost: −25% dog damage.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogBiteEveryNHexed (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: per-dog bite counter, on every Nth hit apply hexed); minionDamageMult (EXISTS)

nodes.name: Pack Resonance
nodes.description: When you crit a Hexed target, all your dogs immediately attack that target (resets their attack timers).
engineFields: rawBehaviors.critHexedTriggersDogPackAttack (NEW — tick.ts post-crit hook: if target had hexed, set all zombie_dog minion nextAttackAt to now)

nodes.name: THE PACK LORD
nodes.description: Each soul_stack you have grants +20% dog damage (uncapped). Cost: dog max HP −50%.
engineFields: rawBehaviors.dogDamagePerSoulStackUncapped (NEW — tick.ts minion attack hook: dog damage *= 1 + soulStackStacks * value/100, no cap); minionHpMult (EXISTS)
